expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Manage workspace membership: invite, roles, revoke, and audit.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add membership schema and invitation token",
      "description": "As an admin, I want a membership table and invitation tokens so members can be invited by email.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add memberships table or extend users->workspaces relation",
        "Add invitation token table or field and expiry",
        "Existing data unaffected",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/xxxx_create_membership.sql",
        "src/models/membership.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Invite member by email",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to invite a member by email so they can join the workspace via invitation link.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Invite endpoint accepts email and sends invitation link with token",
        "Invitation flow creates pending membership and redeems token to create member",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/routes/invite.ts",
        "src/services/inviteService.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Change member role",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to change a member's role between viewer, editor, and admin so permissions update.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add endpoint to change role and persist change",
        "Role change appears immediately in UI",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/routes/members.ts",
        "src/services/roleService.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Revoke workspace access",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to revoke a member's access so they can no longer access workspace resources.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add revoke endpoint that disables membership",
        "Revoked member cannot access workspace resources",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/routes/members.ts",
        "src/services/membershipService.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Record membership changes in audit log and UI view",
      "description": "As an admin, I want membership changes recorded and reviewable so I can audit invites, role changes, and revocations.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Persist audit events for invite, role change, revoke",
        "Expose recent membership changes in workspace settings page",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/services/auditLogger.ts",
        "src/pages/WorkspaceSettings.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.
expectations.evidence:

      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: No story title is a horizontal layer split such as build backend or build frontend.
